title: Access denied
description: The Google-Docs 403 shell. Rendered by the SPA router whenever any tenant-plane API responds 403 with `code === 'access_denied.can_request'`. Reads the resource / permissions / request_payload_template from the route state (populated by the SPA's HTTP error interceptor from the 403 body) and offers the requester the affordance to submit a new access request in a pre-filled modal.

dataSources.name: denial
dataSources.description: Populated by the SPA error interceptor when it caught a 403 with `code='access_denied.can_request'`. Shape: `{ resource, permissions_wanted, request_url, request_payload_template }`.

props.className: mx-auto flex max-w-2xl flex-col items-center gap-6 p-12

children.$expr: denial ? ('You need ' + denial.permissions_wanted.join(' and ') + ' on ' + (denial.resource && denial.resource.display_name ? denial.resource.display_name : denial.resource.type) + ' to see this page. Ask for access below — the resource owner will decide.') : 'You do not have access to this page. If you think this is a mistake, contact your admin.'
'Hmm — our records show you already have ' + denial.permissions_wanted.join(' and ') + '. Try refreshing your session, or contact your admin if this persists.'
